title: Super
description: Minecraft, refreshed. Better performance, beautiful visuals, and much more immersion.
body:
![star with text that says "super", yellow background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3f1060210a5890c4ea903918598bbacc7b99b7d.png)

# Super

![additive](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/built-with/additive_vector.svg)


Over the past year I've been trying to perfect my Minecraft setup. I'm trying to make Minecraft as immersive and beautiful as possible, while still keeping the vanilla touch.

This is that setup.

Super is a reboot of my old project, [Blitz](https://modrinth.com/modpack/blitz-v), but updated to 1.21.4 and has a ton more mods. It's based on Additive & comes with many quality of life, visual, sound, and immersion mods. It's also client side so you can join servers. Above all that, though, Super is *my* modpack. It's tailored to my needs and tastes, and I am (probably) not you. However, I hope you can use this pack as a jumping-off point to create *your* own version of Minecraft.

## Features

- Based on Additive, a great Optifine replacement modpack
- Sound mods, visual mods, quality of life mods, immersion mods
- Comes with a preconfigured, Euphoria-patched Complementary Shaders
- Flashback for making videos
- Geophillic for a refresh of world generation
- Also has a preconfigured [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) resource pack for a small refresh of some textures
